title: FIGS Q3 2025 Deep Dive: Core Product Strength and International Expansion
text: FIGS Q3 2025 earnings showed core product strength with scrubwear maintaining momentum and international expansion gaining traction. Q3 revenues grew with international sales growing significantly as new markets ramped. Management highlighted successful Japan and South Korea launches with early traction. Core scrubwear category remains resilient foundation for growth. Non-scrubwear categories showing stabilization after prior weakness. TEAMS institutional program expanding with new hospital and healthcare system wins. Community Hub retail locations driving foot traffic and brand engagement with approximately 40% of visitors new to brand. Management confidence increasing on ability to balance growth with profitability as operational leverage improves. Strategic initiatives in product innovation, international markets, and omnichannel positioning showing results.
